---
title: "advantage_and_disadvantage_math"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup}
source("./packages.R")
source("./variable_and_functions.R")

abrevs <- c(nor = "normal", adv = "advantage", dis = "disadvantage")
roll.list <- copy(test.roll)
for (abrev in names(abrevs)) {
  roll.list[[abrev]][, Type := abrevs[abrev]]
}
dt <- rbindlist(roll.list)
dt[, Roll := as.integer(Roll)]
dt[, Type := factor(Type, levels = c("advantage", "normal", "disadvantage"))]
colors <- brewer.pal("Set1", n = 9)[c(3, 9, 1)]
```


```{r}
ggplot(dt, aes(x = Roll, y = Hit.wgt, fill = Type)) + 
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), n.breaks = 10, limits = c(0, 0.1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:20) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  theme(legend.position = "top") +
  labs(x = "d20 Roll", y = "Chance")
```

```{r}

```
